overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing a character in a white coat walking through an industrial space station corridor toward a guarded security doorway. The environment features exposed metal piping, warning signage, and warm artificial lighting with a slightly hazy atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor following another pedestrian

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt walking ahead then moving to the left side

entered.detail: large rectangular warning sign with red text mounted on the right wall
industrial air conditioning unit attached to the wall below the warning sign
metal pipes and conduits running along the upper left wall
safety railing along the left side of the corridor
illuminated doorway at the end of the corridor with bright overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor with exposed piping on the walls and warning signage. Following a pedestrian in a blue shirt, the camera moves steadily forward toward a brightly lit doorway at the end of the hall.

events.description: approaching the armed guard standing at the doorway entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the security checkpoint where an armed guard stands watch

notable_agents.action: armed guard standing at the doorway holding a rifle

entered.detail: long rectangular fluorescent light fixture above the doorway
small industrial light fixture mounted on the left wall near the door
metal bench against the left wall near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the illuminated security doorway where an armed guard stands watch. The warning signs and ventilation units from the corridor fall behind as the camera moves closer to the entrance, revealing overhead lighting and a bench near the door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow industrial corridor that culminates at a guarded security checkpoint. It begins by trailing a pedestrian in a blue shirt, moving steadily forward past exposed wall piping and warning signage. As the camera advances, the claustrophobic feel of the hallway gives way to a more open area, with the ventilation units and signs receding into the background. The scene then shifts toward a brightly lit doorway where an armed guard stands watch, revealing overhead lighting and a nearby bench as the camera closes in on the entrance.
